task_completion.description: Navigate to the Person Attribute Types management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenMRS 'Person Attribute Types' administration or management page.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Person Attribute Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Add Person Attribute Type' form with empty fields ready for input.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Name for the attribute type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name input field in the form contains exactly 'Driver's License Number'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Format for the attribute type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Format field (usually a dropdown or text input) is set to exactly 'java.lang.String'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Description for the attribute type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description input field contains exactly 'Government issued driver license ID'.

task_completion.description: Save the attribute type and verify it is active
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the attribute type was saved, and/or the new 'Driver's License Number' attribute type is visible in the list of active Person Attribute Types.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS web GUI to create the attribute type
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the OpenMRS web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows running SQL commands or curl requests to the OpenMRS API.
The agent clicks the save/submit button and the browser loads the subsequent success page or updated list, rather than just filling out the form and stopping.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open and being used to inject the success message or table row.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected values for the new Person Attribute Type are: Name = 'Driver's License Number', Format = 'java.lang.String', Description = 'Government issued driver license ID'.
